name: Rent Manager Property Management API
what_it_does: Rent Manager property management REST API for residential and commercial rental portfolio management, accounting, and tenant lifecycle automation. Enables AI agents to manage property and unit tracking for rental portfolio management, handle tenant application processing and screening for leasing automation, access lease management and renewal tracking for tenant lifecycle, retrieve rent collection and payment processing for property cash flow management, manage maintenance request and work order coordination for property operations, handle trust accounting and owner disbursement for property management financial compliance, access reporting and analytics for portfolio performance monitoring, retrieve vendor and contractor management for property maintenance coordination, manage marketing and vacancy advertising for leasing pipeline automation, and integrate Rent Manager with tenant screening, payment processing, and property marketing platforms.
use_cases: Processing tenant applications from leasing agents
Collecting rent from payment automation agents
Managing work orders from maintenance coordination agents
Generating owner reports from property accounting agents
not_for: Vacation rental without traditional lease structure
HOA management without rental property operations
best_when: A residential or commercial property management company using Rent Manager wanting AI agents to automate tenant screening, lease management, rent collection, maintenance coordination, owner accounting, and integrations.
avoid_when: FAIR HOUSING COMPLIANCE: Automated tenant screening and application processing must comply with FHA and state fair housing laws; automated adverse action based on protected class creates fair housing discrimination liability. FCRA adverse action for tenant screening — automated tenant denial from credit or background check requires FCRA-compliant adverse action notice with report copy; automated denial without notice creates federal FCRA violation. State landlord-tenant law variance — automated lease generation must apply state-specific notice periods, security deposit limits, and lease terms; non-compliant automated leases create unlawful lease provisions. Trust accounting compliance — automated trust account management must comply with state real estate commission rules on client fund handling; automated trust accounting errors create state real estate license disciplinary risk.

auth.notes: Rent Manager uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Covington, Kentucky HQ. Founded 1985 (London Computer Systems). Private. Property management software for 20,000+ residential and commercial property management companies. Both residential and commercial property management. Open API (RMAPI) with robust developer ecosystem. Competes with AppFolio, Buildium, and Propertyware for property management software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-unit monthly pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-unit monthly pricing; volume discounts for large portfolios
pricing.notes: Covington, Kentucky. London Computer Systems. Founded 1985. Private. 20,000+ PM company customers. Residential and commercial focus. Open RMAPI ecosystem.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key and OAuth client; documented in RMAPI documentation

known_agent_gotchas: FAIR HOUSING SCREENING DOCUMENTATION: Automated tenant screening criteria must be consistently applied and documented for fair housing audit defense; automated screening that applies different criteria creates protected class disparate impact — document and apply criteria uniformly

FCRA adverse action compliance — automated tenant denial from credit or background check must issue FCRA adverse action notice with report copy and dispute rights within required timeframe; automated denial without notice creates federal FCRA violation

State landlord-tenant law automation gaps — Rent Manager supports US national but landlord-tenant laws vary significantly by state; automated lease terms, notice periods, and late fees must be configured per state law; default configurations may not comply with all jurisdictions

RMAPI version management — Rent Manager has had multiple RMAPI versions; verify current API version and deprecation schedule for automated integrations; legacy API version dependencies create future migration risk

Trust accounting three-way reconciliation — automated trust account management requires ongoing three-way reconciliation (bank statement, trust ledger, owner ledger); automated trust without reconciliation creates state real estate commission compliance risk

Commercial lease complexity — commercial lease terms (CAM charges, percentage rent, triple-net calculations) are more complex than residential; automated commercial lease billing must correctly calculate and bill additional charges
agent_readiness.security_notes: Property management. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Tenant and property data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property management. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Tenant and rental data.
